'''Genians''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] also known as [[Genian]]. They had [[Color/Legends|violet]] or [[Color|lavender]] skin and were known as skilled diplomats.<ref name="SOTJ" />

==Appearances==
*[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
